   625→
   626→        Connection_Open()

   628→        Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset

   641→            srcPartName.Text = Replace(Rs.Fields("Part_Name").Value, " ", "")
   642→            Dim tmp As String
   643→

   645→                If Asc(Mid(srcPartName.Text, i, 1)) <> 63 Then tmp = tmp & Mid(srcPartName.Text, i, 1)

   667→            TARGET_ECU_SN = Trim(Rs.Fields("ECU_SERIAL").Value)

content.text:
완벽하게 찾았습니다. 정확한 코드를 정리해 드리겠습니다.

## 1. Serial_Scanner_DataReceived 핸들러의 wStep=9 스캔 판정 부분

**파일:** C:\Users\Administrator\Desktop\dsc_nx4\ST01\FrmMain.vb

**줄번호: 537-574**

```vb
        If wStep = 9 Then

            If ScanData.Contains(srcCTR_BUCKLE_Barcode_Target.Text) Then
                If FLAG_CTR_BUCKLE_DUP AndAlso CheckDuplicate("TABLE_MAIN_RH", "ST01_CTR_BUCKLE_SN", ScanData) = True Then
                    srcCTR_BUCKLE_Barcode.Text = ScanData
                    srcCTR_BUCKLE_Barcode_Dec.Text = "중복"
                    srcCTR_BUCKLE_Barcode_Dec.BackColor = Color.Red
                    NG()
                Else
                    srcCTR_BUCKLE_Barcode.Text = ScanData
                    srcCTR_BUCKLE_Barcode_Dec.Text = "OK"
                    srcCTR_BUCKLE_Barcode_Dec.BackColor = Color.Blue
                    DingDOng()
                End If

            ElseIf ScanData.Contains(srcINR_BUCKLE_Barcode_Target.Text) Then
                If FLAG_INR_BUCKLE_DUP AndAlso CheckDuplicate("TABLE_MAIN_RH", "ST01_INR_BUCKLE_SN", ScanData) = True Then
                    srcINR_BUCKLE_Barcode.Text = ScanData
                    srcINR_BUCKLE_Barcode_Dec.Text = "중복"
                    srcINR_BUCKLE_Barcode_Dec.BackColor = Color.Red
                    NG()
                Else
                    srcINR_BUCKLE_Barcode.Text = ScanData
                    srcINR_BUCKLE_Barcode_Dec.Text = "OK"
                    srcINR_BUCKLE_Barcode_Dec.BackColor = Color.Blue
                    DingDOng()
                End If

                ' 프레임 바코드 판정 (NA가 아닌 경우에만)
            ElseIf srcFRAME_BArcode_DEc.Text <> "NA" And srcFRAME_BArcode_Target.Text <> "" And ScanData.Contains(srcFRAME_BArcode_Target.Text) Then
                srcFRAME_BArcode.Text = ScanData
                srcFRAME_BArcode_DEc.Text = "OK"
                srcFRAME_BArcode_DEc.BackColor = Color.Blue
                DingDOng()

            Else
                NG()
            End If

        End If
```

---

## 2. Serial_Tool 관련 DataReceived 핸들러의 토크 판정 부분 (wStep=9)

### 2-1. ThreadTask2 (Serial_Tool1 - INR BUCKLE)

**줄번호: 988-1002**

```vb
                            If wStep = 9 Then

                                srcINR_BUCKLE_TQ.Text = ToolData

                                If ToolData >= BASIC_INR_BUCKLE_TQ_MIN And ToolData <= BASIC_INR_BUCKLE_TQ_MAX And Mid(Tool_String, 109, 1) = "1" Then
                                    srcINR_BUCKLE_TQ_Dec.Text = "OK"
                                    srcINR_BUCKLE_TQ_Dec.BackColor = Color.Blue
                                    DingDOng()
                                Else
                                    srcINR_BUCKLE_TQ_Dec.Text = "NG"
                                    srcINR_BUCKLE_TQ_Dec.BackColor = Color.Red
                                    NG()

```

## 정리

| 항목 | 줄번호 | 역할 |
|------|--------|------|
| **Serial_Scanner wStep=9** | 537-574 | 바코드(CTR/INR/프레임) 스캔 판정 |
| **Serial_Tool1 wStep=9** | 988-1002 | INR BUCKLE 토크값 범위 & 신호 판정 |
| **Serial_Tool2 wStep=9** | 1052-1066 | CTR BUCKLE 토크값 범위 & 신호 판정 |
